I am unable to complete this request as stated.
Your instructions require contradictory sentence counts.
You requested exactly ten sentences.
Simultaneously, you limited the count to at most nine.
Therefore, no single email can fulfill both conditions.
Please specify which constraint you would like me to prioritize.
Once clarified, I will generate the text for you.
I apologize for any confusion this may cause.
Thank you for your understanding regarding this limitation.
Let me know your preference.<|im_end|>
